description: Canonical playback-architecture preset matrix. The base is the cross-product of 3 routing modes x 2 monitor modes (legacy, svm3) = 6 presets; the 7th, http_handoff_http, is an asymmetric cell -- the http monitor (pure-HTTP /getglobalinfo polling) exists ONLY for the http_handoff routing, not as a full column. Single cross-language source of truth, shared by the add-on (resources/lib/kodi/settings_reader.py) and the configurator (presetsdb.ts / mapping.ts). Pinned to the add-on's Python registries by tests/test_playback_presets_consistency.py and to the configurator's emitted presets by mapping.test.ts. Changing this set is a deliberate cross-area contract change - update both sides + this file in lock-step (AGENTS.md: 'six playback-architecture presets are a maintained matrix').
